title: a Hypixel bedwars texture pack
description: a texture pack that changes the way items and blocks look such as the diamond or the sword. this specific texture pack is used for hypixel bedwars.
body:
this texture pack includes new textures for items such as the stone sword, iron sword, wooden sword , netherite sword, gold sword, diaomond sword, wooden pickaxe, stone pickaxe, gold pickaxe, iron pickaxe, diomond pickaxe, netherite pickaxe axe, fire charge, 
hunger bar, wool, crafting gui, furnace gui, iron ingot, gold ingot, it chages the way game apears for hypixel bedwars. it is good for enhanceing the gameplay, take the sword for instance 
it is shorter and alowes for better visibility, and the fire charge is textured to where it looks more like bedwars.
